changeSet.author: AlexKalinckovich
changeSet.comment: Create note table with composite primary key (country, topic_id, id)
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tbl_note ( country text, topic_id bigint, id bigint, content text, PRIMARY KEY ((country), topic_id, id) );

changeSet.author: AlexKalinckovich
changeSet.comment: Create secondary index on id for lookups by single ID
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_note_id ON tbl_note (id);
